metadata.description: Agent coordination skills for code-executing Copilots (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Cursor): a file-based control plane for multi-agent task claiming, resource locking, checkpointed state, and messaging.

plugins.name: agent-coordination-skills
plugins.description: File-based control plane for coordinating multiple Copilot CLI agents: atomic task claiming with dependency gating, leased resource locks with heartbeat-based reaping, checkpointed shared state, and staleness-filtered messaging. Ships a coordination-protocol skill, an orchestrator + worker skill pair, three scoped agents (orchestrator/researcher/editor), and a write-scope enforcement hook.
